evidence.claim: Used XGBoost and LightGBM for ranking models
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion)

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for A/B testing
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: Shipped RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems in production
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Proficient in operational ML (A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining)
evidence.source_text: Along the way I've gotten comfortable with the operational side — A/B testing, drift monitoring, retraining schedules.

evidence.claim: Values cross-functional alignment over pure modeling
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target... that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes pgvector, Flask, FastAPI, TensorFlow, NLP, BentoML, scikit-learn, Time Series, Hugging Face, Weaviate, LlamaIndex, Deep Learning, QLoRA, LangChain, Haystack
evidence.source_text: Skills: Statistical Modeling... pgvector... Flask... FastAPI... TensorFlow... NLP... BentoML... scikit-learn... Time Series... Hugging Face Transformers... Weaviate... LlamaIndex... Deep Learning... QLoRA... LangChain... Haystack
